================================================================================
record_basic
================================================================================
a = {b:10,c:inp,d}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (record_expr
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (variable_expr
              (identifier))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name))))))

================================================================================
record_expr
================================================================================
a =
  {
    b:10,
    c:
      if a
        d
      else
        v
  }
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (record_expr
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (if_expr
              guard: (variable_expr
                (identifier))
              (then
                then: (variable_expr
                  (identifier)))
              (else
                (variable_expr
                  (identifier))))))))))

================================================================================
record_update
================================================================================
main={ ..a ,b: c }
main=
  a {..a, a: B(a), c:a( b, (c+d))}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (record_expr
        (spread_expr
          (variable_expr
            (identifier)))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (variable_expr
              (identifier)))))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (variable_expr
        (identifier))))
  (expr_body
    (record_expr
      (spread_expr
        (variable_expr
          (identifier)))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (function_call_pnc_expr
            caller: (tag_expr
              (tag
                (identifier)))
            args: (variable_expr
              (identifier)))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (function_call_pnc_expr
            caller: (variable_expr
              (identifier))
            args: (variable_expr
              (identifier))
            args: (parenthesized_expr
              expression: (expr_body
                (bin_op_expr
                  part: (variable_expr
                    (identifier))
                  part: (operator)
                  part: (variable_expr
                    (identifier)))))))))))

================================================================================
record pattern
================================================================================
main= match a {
    Some({ state: InCond(body, cond) }) => b
}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (match_expr
        (match)
        (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (tag_pattern
            (tag
              (identifier))
            args: (record_pattern
              (record_field_pattern
                (field_name)
                (tag_pattern
                  (tag
                    (identifier))
                  args: (identifier_pattern
                    (identifier))
                  args: (identifier_pattern
                    (identifier))))))
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (variable_expr
              (identifier))))))))
